title: Narrative Arc — Coherence Beats Compliance
recognition: Transformation efforts often look aligned because visible processes, ceremonies, metrics, and templates are in place.
reframe: Visible compliance can coexist with deep operating incoherence.
framework: Coherence aligns decisions, incentives, language, trust, execution, and feedback around the same operating reality.
proof: The draft distinguishes process performance from system movement through recurring contradictions in priorities, decision rights, incentives, and metrics.
application: Leaders should evaluate whether process improves sensemaking and coordinated action rather than merely whether people followed it.
consequence: A coherent organization can process disagreement and change without fragmenting into competing local systems.
invitation: Ask whether the system makes enough sense to move, not merely whether the process was followed.
